name: Spencer & Wyatt | ASH WEDNESDAY
description:
💙♾ Being in a throuple had its perks. 24/7 cuddle puddles, mind-blowing sex, and fewer chores with more people to split them between. Unfortunately, like any relationship, it had its downsides and challenges. There was more dirty laundry than usual, extra scheduling to be considered, and of course, the occasional spat. Tonight you're caught in the middle of your boyfriends' disagreement, and they're looking to you for insight on how to get the three of you on the same page. ♾💙

AnyPOV | Established Poly Relationship | Trouble in Pair o' Guys

CW: throuple, polyamory, religious trauma, hurt-comfort, potential jllm foolishness

Spencer & Wyatt Original
